title: hfobjectives
description: "HF Objectives is a dynamic mod that brings a fresh layer of excitement to your gameplay with customizable objectives. Whether it’s gathering resources, eliminating mobs, or surviving unique challenges like standing on a block without taking damage.
body:
**HF Objectives: Custom Challenges**


Video demo here!
[https://vimeo.com/1075429635](https://vimeo.com/1075429635)

The HF Objectives mod enhances your Minecraft experience by introducing a range of dynamic, timed objectives. Test your skills and adaptability with tasks that challenge you in unique ways. Whether you're a seasoned adventurer or a casual player, this mod adds an exciting layer of progression and fun.

Features:

Diverse Objectives:

Gather: Collect a specified amount of items (e.g., "Gather 10 arrows").    
Mob Kill: Defeat a certain number of specific mobs (e.g., "Eliminate 3 zombies").    
Don't Get Hit: Survive for a duration without taking any damage.    
Stand: Stand on a specific block for a set amount of time (e.g., "Stand on a gold block for 5 seconds").    
Timed Challenges: Each objective has a time limit, adding urgency to your tasks.

Configurable: Customize objectives and text display colors to your liking via the config file ( config/hfobjectives.json ).    

Auto-Random Objectives: Enable auto-random mode to receive a new objective automatically upon completion of the previous one.    

Commands:

/startobjective <objectiveId>:  Starts a specific objective by its ID.  Use this to manually begin a challenge.    

/completeobjective: Manually complete your current objective.    

/randobj:  Starts a random objective.    

/hfreloadobjectives:  Reloads the objectives configuration from the config file.  Requires operator permissions (permission level 2).    

/autorandom: Toggles auto-random objectives on or off.    

Configuration:

The mod's behavior and appearance can be modified through the config/hfobjectives.json file. Here you can:

Define custom objectives.    
Adjust text colors for objective messages and timers.    
Default Objectives:

The mod includes several default objectives to get you started:

Gather dirt/stone/arrows.    
Eliminate zombies.    
Survive without taking damage.    
Stand on a gold block.    
Important Notes:

This mod is for Fabric.
Ensure you have the Fabric API installed.
Configuration file is located at config/hfobjectives.json.
